title: pteridium lanuginosum
intro: Pteridium lanuginosum, also known as bracken, is a type of perennial fern found in many parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of bracken include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and even exhibit anticancer properties. In terms of herbal preparations, bracken can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or taken as a tincture, although its preparation and usage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
